creator: andrew.hotlab@hotmail.com
text:
This library is used by emulators/virtualbox-ose to allow access guest's console via VNC.

This problem, which makes VM console access not working anymore (with neither without password), appeared since 2024Q1, when net/openssl was upgraded to 3.0. Maybe it's related to the linked GH issue.

Sorry but I do not have the competency to solve it... anyone can help?
